current_nbbo_bid_price.definition: The highest price a buyer is willing to pay for a security

current_nbbo_ask_price.definition: The lowest price a seller is willing to accept for a security

last_trade_volume.definition: The total number of shares traded during the most recent trade

current_nbbo_bid_size.definition: The number of shares buyers want to buy at a specific price

current_nbbo_ask_size.definition: The number of shares sellers want to sell at a specific price

phone.definition: The contact phone number of the company

longBusinessSummary.definition: A brief description of the company and its business operations

maxAge.definition: The maximum age of the data provided

priceHint.definition: The decimal precision of the price data

previousClose.definition: The price at which the stock last traded during the previous trading session

open.definition: The price at which the stock started trading for the current trading session

dayLow.definition: The lowest price at which the stock has traded during the current trading session

dayHigh.definition: The highest price at which the stock has traded during the current trading session

regularMarketPreviousClose.definition: The last closing price in the regular trading session

regularMarketOpen.definition: The price at which the stock opened in the regular trading session

regularMarketDayLow.definition: The lowest price of the stock in the regular trading session

regularMarketDayHigh.definition: The highest price of the stock in the regular trading session

trailingPE.definition: The price-to-earnings ratio based on the last twelve months of earnings

volume.definition: The total number of shares traded during the current trading session

regularMarketVolume.definition: The total number of shares traded in the regular market session

averageVolume.definition: The average daily trading volume over a specified period

averageVolume10days.definition: The average daily trading volume over the last 10 days

averageDailyVolume10Day.definition: The average daily trading volume for the last 10 days

totalAssets.definition: The total value of a company's assets

fiftyTwoWeekLow.definition: The lowest price of the stock in the last 52 weeks

fiftyTwoWeekHigh.definition: The highest price of the stock in the last 52 weeks

fiftyDayAverage.definition: The average stock price over the last 50 days

twoHundredDayAverage.definition: The average stock price over the last 200 days

navPrice.definition: The net asset value per share of a fund

currency.definition: The currency in which the stock is traded

category.definition: The industry category to which the company belongs

ytdReturn.definition: The return on investment from the start of the year to date

fundFamily.definition: The financial institution that manages the fund

fundInceptionDate.definition: The date on which the fund was established

legalType.definition: The legal classification of the company

exchange.definition: The stock exchange where the security is listed

quoteType.definition: The type of asset (e.g., equity, ETF, mutual fund, etc.)

symbol.definition: The trading symbol of the stock

underlyingSymbol.definition: The symbol of the underlying asset in derivatives

shortName.definition: The abbreviated name of the company

longName.definition: The full name of the company

firstTradeDateEpochUtc.definition: The date and time of the stock’s first trade in epoch format

timeZoneFullName.definition: The full name of the time zone for the exchange

timeZoneShortName.definition: The short name of the time zone for the exchange

uuid.definition: A unique identifier for the stock

messageBoardId.definition: An ID for the message board where discussions about the stock take place

gmtOffSetMilliseconds.definition: The time difference from GMT in milliseconds

trailingPegRatio.definition: A modified price/earnings-to-growth ratio based on trailing earnings

address1.definition: The primary address of the company

address2.definition: The secondary address of the company

city.definition: The city where the company is headquartered

state.definition: The state where the company is headquartered

zip.definition: The postal code of the company’s headquarters

country.definition: The country where the company is headquartered

website.definition: The official website of the company

industry.definition: The industry classification of the company

sector.definition: The sector classification of the company

marketCap.definition: The total market value of the company’s outstanding shares

sharesOutstanding.definition: The total number of shares issued by the company

heldPercentInstitutions.definition: The percentage of shares held by institutional investors

bookValue.definition: The total value of assets minus liabilities per share

priceToBook.definition: The ratio of the stock price to its book value

lastFiscalYearEnd.definition: The end date of the last fiscal year

nextFiscalYearEnd.definition: The expected end date of the next fiscal year

trailingEps.definition: The earnings per share for the last twelve months

lastSplitFactor.definition: The ratio of the last stock split

lastSplitDate.definition: The date of the last stock split

52WeekChange.definition: The percentage change in stock price over the last 52 weeks

SandP52WeekChange.definition: The stock’s performance relative to the S&P 500 over 52 weeks

currentPrice.definition: The latest traded price of the stock

financialCurrency.definition: The currency used in financial reporting

fullTimeEmployees.definition: The number of full-time employees in the company

exDividendDate.definition: The date when a stock starts trading without the dividend

priceToSalesTrailing12Months.definition: The ratio of price to revenue for the last 12 months

enterpriseValue.definition: The total value of the company, including debt and equity

floatShares.definition: The number of shares available for trading

sharesShort.definition: The total number of shares sold short

sharesShortPriorMonth.definition: The number of shares sold short in the previous month

sharesShortPreviousMonthDate.definition: The date of the previous month's short interest report

dateShortInterest.definition: The date of the short interest report

sharesPercentSharesOut.definition: The percentage of shares outstanding that are shorted

heldPercentInsiders.definition: The percentage of shares held by insiders

shortRatio.definition: The number of days required to cover short positions

shortPercentOfFloat.definition: The percentage of the float that is shorted

netIncomeToCommon.definition: The net income available to common shareholders

enterpriseToRevenue.definition: The ratio of enterprise value to revenue

lastDividendValue.definition: The amount of the last dividend paid per share

lastDividendDate.definition: The date of the last dividend payment

totalCash.definition: The total cash available to the company

totalCashPerShare.definition: The total cash per share available

totalDebt.definition: The total debt held by the company

quickRatio.definition: The ratio of liquid assets to current liabilities

currentRatio.definition: The ratio of current assets to current liabilities

totalRevenue.definition: The total revenue generated by the company

debtToEquity.definition: The ratio of total debt to shareholders' equity

revenuePerShare.definition: The revenue generated per outstanding share

grossProfits.definition: The total profit after subtracting the cost of goods sold

operatingCashflow.definition: The cash generated from the company's operations

revenueGrowth.definition: The rate at which the company's revenue is growing

operatingMargins.definition: The percentage of revenue remaining after operating expenses

fiveYearAvgDividendYield.definition: The average annual dividend yield of a stock over the past five years, expressed as a percentage

beta.definition: A measure of a stock's volatility compared to the market

forwardPE.definition: The price-to-earnings ratio based on projected future earnings

profitMargins.definition: The percentage of revenue retained as profit after expenses

impliedSharesOutstanding.definition: The estimated number of shares available in the market

forwardEps.definition: The projected earnings per share for the next period

enterpriseToEbitda.definition: The ratio of enterprise value to EBITDA

targetHighPrice.definition: The highest forecasted stock price by analysts

targetLowPrice.definition: The lowest stock price estimate based on analysts' projections for future performance

targetMeanPrice.definition: The average of analysts' projected stock prices over a given period

targetMedianPrice.definition: The median value of analysts' projected stock prices

recommendationMean.definition: The average of analysts' stock recommendation ratings

numberOfAnalystOpinions.definition: The number of financial analysts who have provided their ratings or opinions on the stock

ebitda.definition: A company's profit from core operations excluding interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization

returnOnAssets.definition: A measure of how efficiently a company uses its assets to generate profit

returnOnEquity.definition: A measure of a company's profitability relative to shareholders' equity

freeCashflow.definition: The cash available after operating expenses and capital expenditures

grossMargins.definition: The percentage of revenue remaining after the cost of goods sold

ebitdaMargins.definition: The percentage of revenue represented by EBITDA

auditRisk.definition: The risk of inaccuracies or fraud in a company's financial statements

boardRisk.definition: The risk associated with a company's board structure and governance

shareHolderRightsRisk.definition: The risk related to shareholders' ability to influence company decisions

overallRisk.definition: The combined risk from financial, governance, and operational factors

governanceEpochDate.definition: The date when the latest governance risk assessment was conducted

earningsQuarterlyGrowth.definition: The year-over-year growth rate of earnings for the latest quarter

earningsGrowth.definition: The year-over-year growth rate of a company's earnings

beta3Year.definition: A stock's volatility relative to the market over the past three years

threeYearAverageReturn.definition: The average annual return of an investment over three years

fiveYearAverageReturn.definition: The average annual return of an investment over five years

yield.definition: The annual dividend income as a percentage of the investment's market price

dividendRate.definition: The total annual dividend paid per share

dividendYield.definition: The annual dividend income as a percentage of the stock's current price

payoutRatio.definition: The percentage of earnings paid out as dividends to shareholders

trailingAnnualDividendRate.definition: The total dividends paid per share over the past 12 months

trailingAnnualDividendYield.definition: The dividend yield based on the past 12 months of dividends
